generated_oml:
instance IlluminanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for environmental monitoring of lighting-related data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for post-occupancy data monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance IlluminanceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IlluminanceSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance IlluminanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time illuminance measurements from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor data for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting control in Building Control Systems"
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for HVAC regulation in Building Control Systems"
]

instance BIMAsset : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) assets enriched with device metadata and middleware configurations for Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance Revit : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tool for creating and managing building information models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering methodologies for automated model-to-model and model-to-text transformations"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionInsight, VisualComfortAssessmentInsight, HealthEffectsAnalysisInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionInsight, LightingAdjustmentAction
]

instance VisualComfortService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of visual comfort metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAssessmentInsight, LightingAdjustmentAction
]

instance HealthEffectsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of non-visual health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthEffectsAnalysisInsight, HVACRegulationAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building performance for life cycle optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5 for Facility Managers"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight, LightingAdjustmentAction, HVACRegulationAction
]

instance EnergyConsumptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights for optimizing energy consumption"
]

instance VisualComfortAssessmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of visual comfort based on lighting and environmental data"
]

instance HealthEffectsAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of non-visual health effects from environmental conditions"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from building performance simulations"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visual representation of building data for Facility Managers"
]

instance LightingAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting based on insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACRegulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated regulation of HVAC systems based on insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Living Lab building infrastructure in AECO domain for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle optimization"
    base:contains IlluminanceSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator, HVACController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals transmitted from the DT to physical Building Control Systems (BCS) via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling adjustments to lighting and other systems based on simulation and optimization results."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical assets and the digital twin, with continuous data exchange for operational monitoring and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized hub integrating Eclipse Hono, Ditto, and Unreal Engine with modular service components, enabling bidirectional data exchange, visualization, and extensible service integration for comprehensive building management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire building life cycle, including design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, enabling continuous optimization throughout the building's life cycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability, synchronization fidelity, and architectural soundness between physical and virtual representations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto protocols for secure, scalable real-time data exchange between physical assets and the Digital Twin."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized interfaces for interoperability with external systems, enabling integration with facility management software and IoT platforms through modular service-oriented architecture."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards and standardized integration frameworks for interoperability in the AECO domain."
]
